subject: terra_prod/lambda API Gateway throttling defaults
fact: The HTTP API default stage applies throttling via variables `api_throttling_burst_limit` and `api_throttling_rate_limit`, whose defaults are burst 10 and rate 5 requests/second unless overridden.
reason: This explains why load tests can produce many 429 responses even when Lambda itself is healthy, and it is useful for future debugging and threshold tuning.
